columns.name: EXTERNALID
columns.description: Unique external identifier for the order line

columns.name: TOURID
columns.description: Identifier of the tour or delivery route

columns.name: SHIPMENTID
columns.description: Identifier of the shipment or delivery

columns.name: LOADNUMBER
columns.description: Unique identifier for a load on a vehicle

columns.name: STATUS
columns.description: Current status of the order line

columns.name: KVITTERT
columns.description: Indicates whether the order line has been invoiced

columns.name: PLANLAGT_ANTALL
columns.description: Planned quantity for the order line

columns.name: INNVEID_ANTALL
columns.description: Quantity received or verified for the order line

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was last updated

columns.name: BRUKERID
columns.description: Identifier of the user who created or modified the order line

columns.name: SEND_MLS
columns.description: Indicates whether a confirmation message should be sent to ML System

columns.name: NYTT_LINJENR
columns.description: The new line number for the order line after modifications

columns.name: SYSTEM
columns.description: Indicates the system or application that created or modified the record
